title: Cosmos Drum Pads — MPC-style 16-pad synthesized percussion instrument
title_vi: Cosmos Drum Pads — nhạc cụ gõ tổng hợp 16 pad kiểu MPC
summary: An MPC-style 4x4 grid of 16 velocity pads that PLAYS REAL SOUND via the Web Audio API on interaction — every voice is synthesized live from oscillators and filtered white noise (16 distinct percussion voices: 2 kicks, 2 snares, closed/open hats, 3 toms, clap, rimshot, cowbell, zap, laser, perc, shaker). Click a pad or press a mapped key to trigger it with a bright flash, an expanding ripple ring, and a bouncing level meter. Fully self-contained with zero dependencies, no CDN and no samples; also ships a silent deterministic looping visual groove for capture.
usage_notes: RUN: open & click pads or press keys 1-4 / Q-R / A-F / Z-V to HEAR it (audio needs a user gesture; AudioContext is created/resumed only on the first pointerdown/keydown). KEY TECHNIQUES: pitch-drop sine kicks (exponential frequency ramp), bandpassed-noise snares with a tonal triangle body, multi-tap noise-burst clap, highpass-filtered noise closed/open hats, sine/triangle pitch-drop toms, square-wave rimshot, dual-square (540/800Hz) cowbell through a bandpass, sawtooth pitch-sweep zap/laser, and ADSR-style ramped gain envelopes (setValueAtTime + exponentialRampToValueAtTime + setTargetAtTime to avoid clicks), all summed through a master gain of 0.2 into a DynamicsCompressor. CAPTURE: ?auto=1 is SILENT (no AudioContext ever created) and exposes window.__seek(t) for deterministic visuals — a mulberry32-seeded 16-step pattern (kicks on downbeats, snare backbeat, hats on 8ths) drives pad flashes, ripples and the meter, with a frame-0 phase offset so u=0 is mid-performance. TUNE: edit the VOICES table (frequency/decay per pad), the pattern builder, LOOP length, PHASE offset, and master gain.
summary_vi: Lưới 4x4 gồm 16 pad cảm ứng lực kiểu MPC PHÁT ÂM THANH THẬT qua Web Audio API khi tương tác — mỗi giọng được tổng hợp trực tiếp từ oscillator và nhiễu trắng đã lọc (16 giọng gõ riêng biệt: 2 kick, 2 snare, hi-hat đóng/mở, 3 tom, clap, rimshot, cowbell, zap, laser, perc, shaker). Bấm pad hoặc nhấn phím để kích hoạt kèm hiệu ứng sáng, vòng gợn lan ra và thanh đo nảy. Hoàn toàn độc lập, không phụ thuộc, không CDN, không sample; kèm theo bản groove hình ảnh tĩnh lặng có tính tất định để chụp/ghi.
notes: Đây là nhạc cụ trống tương tác — nhớ mở ra rồi bấm phím/chuột để nghe âm thanh thật.
